How it works

This is what happens after
you join MINDSCALE

Everything you need to launch a profitable digital product business — without creating content, writing code, or spending money on ads.

Step 01

Get a proven digital product to sell as your own

Our team curates a premium library of high-converting courses. Choose one, rebrand it in a few clicks, and start making sales — your first Shopify order could be today.

Step 02

Get a high-converting landing page in minutes

Every course comes with a plug & play landing page already built. Personalise your links, connect your payment and it's live — no coding, no design work required.

Step 03

Get your first sales from viral-ready content

2,000+ viral videos & 2,000+ luxury photos — cars, jets, aspirational content ready to post. No face, no ads needed.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

At MINDSCALE, we are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy.

  • We collect only the information necessary to provide our services (name, email, payment info).
  • We never sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
  • Your payment information is processed securely through encrypted payment processors.
  • You may request deletion of your account and data at any time by contacting our support team.
  • We use cookies to improve your experience on our platform. You may disable cookies in your browser settings.
  • We may update this policy periodically. Continued use of MINDSCALE constitutes acceptance of any changes.

For any privacy-related questions, contact us at ianvonbertrabherrera@gmail.com

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: June 2026

By using MINDSCALE, you agree to the following terms:

  • You must be at least 18 years old to use our platform.
  • The 7-day free trial gives you full access. You may cancel before the trial ends with no charge.
  • Digital products provided through MINDSCALE are licensed for resale under our platform's terms.
  • You are responsible for your own marketing and business activities on third-party platforms.
  • MINDSCALE does not guarantee specific earnings or results. Income depends on individual effort.
  • Misuse, fraud, or violation of these terms may result in immediate account termination.
  • All content provided (videos, courses, pages) remains the intellectual property of MINDSCALE until resold under license.

For questions about these terms, contact ianvonbertrabherrera@gmail.com
